questions.question: Paul says he is confident that God who began a good work in the Philippians will do what?
options: Complete it until the day of Christ Jesus
questions.answer: Complete it until the day of Christ Jesus

questions.question: Paul says for him, to live is Christ and to die is what?
Paul was writing this letter from prison.
For to me, to live is Christ, and to die is _____.
He who began a good work in you will _____ it until the day of Jesus Christ.
